home.alertSelectDates: Please select check-in and check-out dates.
home.locationsDesc: Alsace Hideaways properties are nestled across Strasbourg, France — each one a quiet escape from the everyday.

shelterDetails.waMessage: Hi, I'm interested in booking the {{shelterName}}. Could you please provide availability and pricing details?

searchResults.title: Available Shelters
searchResults.noSheltersPrefix: No shelters available for the selected dates. Try different dates or
searchResults.waMessage_one: Hi, I'd like to book {{shelterName}} from {{checkin}} to {{checkout}} for {{count}} guest.
searchResults.waMessage_other: Hi, I'd like to book {{shelterName}} from {{checkin}} to {{checkout}} for {{count}} guests.

reservation.successBody: Thank you, <0>{{firstName}}</0>! Your booking request for <1>{{shelterName}}</1> has been received. A confirmation email is on its way to <2>{{email}}</2>.
reservation.successNote: For the quickest response and to confirm your reservation, reach out to us on WhatsApp. We'll send you an invoice and finalise the details.
reservation.completeBookingSub: Fill in your details and we'll send you an invoice via email.
reservation.errorInvalidDates: Please select valid check-in and check-out dates.
reservation.errorMinNights_one: {{shelterName}} requires a minimum stay of {{count}} night.
reservation.errorMinNights_other: {{shelterName}} requires a minimum stay of {{count}} nights.
reservation.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
reservation.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
reservation.errorNetwork: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
reservation.invoiceNoteBody: Once you submit, we'll send an invoice to your email and our team will confirm your reservation. For the fastest response, contact us on WhatsApp at
reservation.invoiceSentNote: Invoice will be sent to your email after booking.

seo.defaultTitle: Alsace Hideaways — Luxury Holiday Rentals in Strasbourg, France
seo.defaultDescription: Discover exceptional holiday properties across Strasbourg, France. Alsace Hideaways offers handpicked retreats — from serene countryside shelters to elegant woodland escapes.
